from manim import *

class PythagoreanTheorem(Scene):
    def construct(self):
        a = ValueTracker(0)
        b = ValueTracker(0)
        c = ValueTracker(0)

        a_label = Tex(r"a").scale(0.8)
        b_label = Tex(r"b").scale(0.8)
        c_label = Tex(r"c").scale(0.8)

        a_line = Line(LEFT, RIGHT).scale(2)
        b_line = Line(LEFT, RIGHT).scale(2)
        c_line = Line(LEFT, RIGHT).scale(2)

        a_line.shift(UP * 2)
        b_line.shift(LEFT * 2)
        c_line.shift(RIGHT * 2)

        a_label.move_to(a_line.get_start())
        b_label.move_to(b_line.get_start())
        c_label.move_to(c_line.get_start())

        self.add(a_line, b_line, c_line, a_label, b_label, c_label)

        self.play(a.animate.set_value(3), b.animate.set_value(4), rate_func=linear, run_time=2)
        self.wait()

        c_line.shift(RIGHT * (a.get_value()**2 + b.get_value()**2)**0.5)
        c_label.move_to(c_line.get_start())

        self.play(a.animate.set_value(0), b.animate.set_value(0), c.animate.set_value((3**2 + 4**2)**0.5), rate_func=linear, run_time=2)
        self.wait()

        self.play(a.animate.set_value(5), b.animate.set_value(12), rate_func=linear, run_time=2)
        self.wait()

        c_line.shift(RIGHT * (a.get_value()**2 + b.get_value()**2)**0.5)
        c_label.move_to(c_line.get_start())

        self.play(a.animate.set_value(0), b.animate.set_value(0), c.animate.set_value((5**2 + 12**2)**0.5), rate_func=linear, run_time=2)
        self.wait()

        theorem = Tex(r"a^2 + b^2 = c^2").scale(0.8)
        theorem.shift(DOWN * 2)
        self.play(Write(theorem))
        self.wait()
